content.en:
The End of the World.

This is the territory of the Boundary River Life, which has given birth to a large number of powerful Boundary River lifeforms, as well as many resources.

After Ye Tian entered here, what he felt was the endless silver void and the azure waters, as well as many traces of battle.

Now.

Ye Tian was in the Boundary Realm area close to the thirteenth Boundary River, where the Boundary River had fewer lives, and the number of Peak Legendary Realm Lords and Half-Step Eternal Masters was slightly larger.

"Copy the talent!"

Ye Tian went all out to explore the copying talent.

There is no Eternal Master here, as he will not worry about the discovery of his copying talent.

Although the distance of the copy talent probe is limited, it can still be easily ~ detected by other lifeforms.

Some of the Boundary River Beings are so hidden that they are difficult to find unless they are carefully explored, but under the probing of the Copying Talent, they are absolutely impossible to hide.

"In order to prevent this replica body from falling, and to re-enter, another replica body must be condensed, so that there is no need to worry-. "

Ye Tian quickly condensed another replica body.

In this way, he has two replica bodies at the end of the realm.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian found an island, opened up a place to live on the mountains of the island, and then used the magic circle to hide it, and he also restrained his breath, and practiced here for a long time.

Another replica body roams the ends of this realm, hunting down powerful beings.

......

Somewhere at the end of the world.

Ye Tian suddenly discovered a Boundary River Life, and his strength was also at the peak of the fifth level Legendary Realm Lord Realm.

With his current strength, there is still hope for killing such a Boundary River life.

After all, his life level was too strong, and the Supreme Legendary Body was complete, and his true combat power was not much weaker than that of a half-step Eternal Master.

He may not be able to defeat a true half-step Eternal Master, but he can crush any fifth-level peak Legendary Realm Lord.

Ye Tian walked in the void and approached the other party.

The perception ability of this boundary river life is still very strong, and Ye Tian was soon discovered.

It was also at this time that Ye Tian directly used the space-time control technique - Three Thousand Void Hands!

Bang!!!

Three thousand void hands bombarded the opponent's body, directly knocking out blood-colored holes in the body of this Boundary River life.

However, if you want to kill this boundary river life in one move, you still can't do it.

However, the blow also hit it hard.

Airplanes!!!

A terrifying move erupted in an instant, and the space-time of the surrounding territory shattered in an instant, and everything turned into nothingness.

There is no way to dodge this move, so the speed of this move is too fast, and the area covered is too large.

However, Ye Tian's physical body was too powerful, so he couldn't withstand the space-time shattering, and it was just some minor injuries.

Then, Ye Tian used three thousand void hands again and again, and only then did he completely bombard the life of this boundary river.

After killing it, Ye Tian cast the secret of swallowing and swallowed it into his body in one gulp.

Although he only needed essence blood, other body tissues could also be refined, so there was no harm to him.

Soon.

Ye Tian found that this kind of Boundary River Life that had just been killed had a better effect on the essence blood in its body than the dead Boundary River Life Essence Blood.

However, the life of this boundary river is relatively ordinary, so it is not of much help to Ye Tian.

If it was the Boundary River Life of a powerful half-step Eternal Master, it would be of great use to him.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian continued to hunt and kill the life of the boundary river at the end of the realm, and one after another the life of the boundary river died at his hands.

However, Ye Tian often encountered some half-step Eternal Controller level Boundary River lifeforms, so he could only flee in embarrassment.

Moreover, in the end of the realm, there were also some terrifying realm river beings that Ye Tian couldn't provoke, and their IQ was not lower than that of cultivators.

Of course, if a certain Boundary River Life Race gives birth to an Eternal Master, this Boundary River Life Race will completely evolve into a cultivation Boundary River Race, for example, among the thirteenth Boundary River, many special races of Boundary River Life are undoubtedly separated from cultivators, and completely separated from other Boundary River Life Beings who have little wisdom.

The reason why cultivators hunt the life of the boundary river is that the wisdom of the life of the boundary river is low, and the life of the boundary river is a treasure all over the body, so they will be reduced to prey.

However, there are also many Eternal Masters who are promoted to the Boundary River Beings who are willing to protect these Boundary River Lives, so the Eternal Masters will not enter the Realm.

Ye Tian not only needed to be afraid of those top-notch Boundary River Beings, but also some half-step Eternal Controllers.

Here, it is very normal for the Peak Legendary Realm Lords to fight each other, and some half-step Eternal Masters will even snatch the resources of the Peak Legendary Realm Lords.

In short, trust no one here but yourself.

Ye Tian didn't encounter any danger at first, even if he encountered a strong enemy, as long as it wasn't too strong, he had hope of escaping.

But this day.

Ask for flowers

Ye Tian still encountered an incomparably terrifying Boundary River life.

Rumble!!!

Far away, a silvery-white giant ape stood, holding the corpse of a half-step Eternal Master.

When Ye Tian saw this scene, his expression was shocked, knowing that this was a Boundary River life that he was far from being able to compete with.

Wow!

The other party bombarded in an instant, shattering time and space with one punch, and even transcending time and space, even with Ye Tian's Eternal Will in the early stage of the Eighth Order, he couldn't react.

Then, Ye Tian's body was directly bombarded.

Of course.

Ye Tian is a copy of the body, once killed, it will turn into energy and dissipate, unable to bring benefits to the other party.

"The strength of that giant ape is terrifying, far beyond the average half-step eternal master, I estimate that the half-step eternal master who controls more than seventy percent of the supreme legendary body can hope to compete with it!"

......... ，......... ，

Ye Tian said darkly.

Although his copy body was killed, he didn't care, and soon condensed a copy body and continued to break through the world.

Time flies.

Ye Tian didn't know how many battles he had gone through, and he didn't know how many times he had fallen.

But the countless battles and life-and-death crises have made Ye Tian's control of the Supreme Legendary Body improve little by little.

However, Ye Tian's biggest gain was not this, but a door control level ancestral endowment.

At the end of the realm, there are many powerful boundary river lifeforms, and there are also boundary river lifeforms with control-level ancestral endowments.

Once Ye Tian encountered it, he immediately copied it.

For example, the silver-white giant ape that he encountered for the first time, the other party had a control-level power ancestral endowment, and Ye Tian also copied it directly.

Now, Ye Tian has a large number of control-level ancestral endowments, his own heritage and potential are getting stronger and stronger, and his cultivation speed is naturally getting faster and faster.

Moreover, the speed at which Ye Tian created the space-time control technique was also extremely fast.

Now, Ye Tian has created an incomparably terrifying space-time control technique by deducing the sword and slashing three bodies, fusing the past, present, and future.

He named this space-time mastery technique the Extreme Sky Slashing Sword!

This space-time control technique is also Ye Tian's most powerful space-time control technique at present.

Moreover, Ye Tian also deduced the space-time forbidden domain and the Qiandao True Body to the level of space-time control techniques, allowing him to master many space-time control techniques, and his strength was already extremely powerful.

With his current strength, he could kill the weaker fifth-level peak Legendary Realm Lord, and he could do it with one move. _
